metadata.name: Manthara
metadata.primary_role: Kaikeyi's maid-servant and manipulator / Catalyst of Rama's exile
metadata.ethnicity_cultural_context: Ancient Indian (servant class, possibly of southern origin, lifelong attendant to Kaikeyi)

timelines.context_description: The hunchbacked maid who poisons Kaikeyi's mind against Rama, convincing her to demand Bharata's coronation and Rama's exile.

physical_appearance.skin_tone: Sallow yellowish-dark complexion, unhealthy pallor, skin rough and poorly maintained
physical_appearance.height: Short and visibly deformed — a pronounced hunchback (kyphosis) that forces her to walk bent over, head jutting forward
physical_appearance.build: Twisted and hunched frame, thin bony limbs, surprisingly strong grip in her gnarled fingers, moves with a shuffling sideways gait
physical_appearance.facial_features: Sharp cunning face — small darting suspicious eyes that miss nothing, pointed thin nose, thin pursed lips always whispering, prominent chin, deep lines of chronic resentment etched around her mouth, perpetual calculating expression
physical_appearance.hair: Thin grey-streaked hair pulled back tightly in a scraggly bun, a few strands always escaping messily
physical_appearance.distinguishing_marks: Her pronounced hunchback is her defining physical feature — she uses her deformity to garner sympathy and underestimate her cunning, her hands gesture constantly while she whispers

wardrobe_and_adornments.clothing: Simple servant's cotton sari in dull dark colors — brown, dull green, faded maroon — practical and unremarkable, a shawl that partially hides her hunch
wardrobe_and_adornments.jewelry: Cheap brass bangles, no gold — but after Kaikeyi's boons she is promised riches, wears a few pieces gifted by Kaikeyi over the years
wardrobe_and_adornments.weapons_carried: None — her weapon is her tongue and her cunning whispers

audio_and_voice_characteristics.tone: Insinuating, wheedling, sly, venomous sweetness that drips with poison, a master manipulator's voice
audio_and_voice_characteristics.pitch: High-pitched, nasal, whispery — the kind of voice that gets inside your head, sibilant and insinuating
audio_and_voice_characteristics.speech_style: Speaks in conspiratorial whispers, builds elaborate arguments through emotional manipulation, alternates between flattery and fear-mongering, uses rhetorical questions to plant doubt ('And what will happen to YOU, my queen, when Rama is king?')
audio_and_voice_characteristics.emotional_baseline: Deep resentment, cunning ambition, loyal to Kaikeyi in her own twisted way, feeds on the power of manipulation, possibly driven by lifetime of humiliation for her deformity

cinematic_generation_prompts.visual_prompt: Dramatic cinematic shot of Manthara, age 55, hunchbacked servant, whispering into Queen Kaikeyi's ear. Sallow yellowish-dark complexion, sharp cunning face with small darting eyes, thin pursed lips, pointed nose. Pronounced hunchback, thin twisted frame in a dull dark cotton sari. Gnarled fingers gesturing while whispering. Standing behind the seated Kaikeyi in a darkened palace chamber, shadows and lamplight creating sinister atmosphere. 3D Pixar style, dramatic chiaroscuro, sinister mood, photorealistic, 8k.
cinematic_generation_prompts.audio_prompt: A high-pitched, nasal, whispery female voice. Insinuating and sly, dripping with venomous sweetness. Conspiratorial whispers that plant doubt. Age approximately 55 years.
